name: Punkvism
description: Punkvism is a Web3 platform merging the rebellious spirit of punk with activism to redefine how digital and real-world assets (RWA) create value. Built around the PunkyKongz NFT community, it connects industries like real estate, gaming, healthcare, and entertainment via blockchain. With the PVT governance token, Punkvism enables decentralized access, community-driven decisions, and cross-industry synergy. Its long-term vision includes a scalable blockchain, global ecosystem growth, and bridging virtual and physical economies.
